'''√ng-w-s''' ('''kangawas''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:dearomatise|dearomatise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-w-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dearomatise|dearomatise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √ng-w-s
|-
! Lemma
| kangawas
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thingawas || jingawas || shingawas || kingawas
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthungawas || jujungawas || shushungawas || kukungawas
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thungawas || jungawas || shungawas || kungawas
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thungawas || jungawas || shungawas || kungawas
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thengawas || jengawas || shengawas || kengawas
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothongawas || jojongawas || shoshongawas || kokongawas
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thongawas || jongawas || shongawas || kongawas
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thongawas || jongawas || shongawas || kongawas
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || ngawas || ngawas || ngawas || ngawas
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || ngawas || ngawas || ngawas || ngawas
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || ngawas || ngawas || ngawas || ngawas
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || ngawas || ngawas || ngawas || ngawas
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thængawas || jængawas || shængawas || kængawas
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathangawas || jajangawas || shashangawas || kakangawas
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thangawas || jangawas || shangawas || kangawas
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thangawas || jangawas || shangawas || kangawas
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shangawas
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshangawas
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishangawas
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shangawasnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshangawasnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishangawasnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shangawasshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshangawasnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishangawasshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shangawasro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshangawasnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishangawasro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shangawasmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshangawasnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishangawasmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shangawassher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshangawasnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishangawassher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shangawasng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshangawasnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishangawasng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shangawasya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshangawasnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishangawasya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shangawasyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshangawasnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishangawasyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shangawasnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshangawasnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishangawasnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shangawasnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshangawasnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishangawasnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shangawasnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshangawasnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishangawasnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shangawasshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshangawasnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishangawasshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shangawasshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshangawasnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishangawasshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shangawasshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshangawasnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishangawasshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shangawasronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshangawasnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishangawasronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shangawasroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshangawasnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishangawasroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shangawasromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshangawasnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishangawasromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shangawasmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshangawasnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishangawasmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shangawasmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshangawasnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishangawasmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shangawasmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshangawasnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishangawasmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
